issues.detail: Missing error handling and edge case coverage in instructions.
Skill is vendor-locked to MotherDuck, not generic across AI agents.
External data sources are loaded without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Hybrid local-cloud join in Python
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the exact md:analytics connection plus single-query JOIN of cloud table with read_parquet on local file, while baseline falls back to two-step export/import patterns.

scenarios.name: Daily KPI materialization script
scenarios.rationale: Treatment mirrors the CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE daily_kpis pattern with conditional aggregates and 90-day filter on md:analytics, while baseline writes generic SQL without MotherDuck connection idioms.
